testimonials.title: Those who have already lived the experience.
testimonials.description: Accounts of those who trusted their idea, their skin and their story to the studio.

items.1: Best tattoo artist ever! I loved my first tattoos so much. He's the only one I trust.
items.2: I chose you to do my very first tattoo! Great vibe, patience, and quality!
items.3: A tattoo artist of excellence. Seriously, with every art he makes, you want to get more.
items.4: My favorite! I will get many more tattoos with you. Impeccable work! 🥰
items.5: I'm already researching the next one! Great professional 👏
items.6: The best! I will definitely get many more tattoos 😌
items.11:
I've known Lucas and followed his work since practically the beginning, when he still worked as a body piercer.

My first tattoo was with him in 2019. Since then, we have done almost 30 tattoos, all made by him. In a way, I followed his evolution closely, his growth as an artist, and the dedication he puts into every work.

I'm proud to say that, in some way, I'm part of this journey. And as I always say to him, Lucas is one of the best tattoo artists in Ribeirão Preto and the region.

artist.name: Lucas Zerra
artist.p1: My name is Lucas Zerra and I have been a tattoo artist since 2018. My history with tattooing began within my own family, coming from a generation of tattoo artists. It was through my older brother, my first master, that I discovered this universe and developed my passion for art.
artist.p2: Since then, I have been building my trajectory with dedication, exploring different styles and constantly evolving as an artist. I like to work on projects starting from minimalist, fine ones to colorful, complex compositions, always seeking to create tattoos with personality, meaning, and originality.
artist.p3: Today, living in Ribeirão Preto, I carry a background marked by experiences, evolution, and recognition. Along my journey, I have won awards at 5 tattoo conventions, which represents not only results, but also all the dedication put into every detail of my work.
artist.p4: Tattooing completely changed my life. More than a profession, it has become part of who I am. It is through art that I am able to express myself, connect stories, and transform ideas into something unique and permanent.

manifesto.title: Silence, Precision, Art.
manifesto.text: "ZERRAINK is not an image factory. It is a studio of intentions. I believe that tattooing is the trace of a journey and, therefore, I dedicate time and soul to every inch of skin."

trajectory.title: A journey built with art and purpose.

step1.title: Family origin
step1.desc: Tattooing has always been part of my story. Coming from a generation of tattoo artists, I found in my older brother, my first master, the gateway to this universe.

step2.title: Constant evolution
step2.desc: Since 2018, I have been dedicating myself every day to evolve as an artist, exploring techniques, references and new possibilities to deliver my best in every project.

step3.title: Style versatility
step3.desc: I work with a wide variety of styles, from minimalist and fine line to colorful and complex, always seeking the best artistic solution for each idea.

step4.title: Recognition
step4.desc: Awarded in 5 tattoo conventions, a result of much study, practice, and respect for every detail of the creative and technical process.

val1.title: Safety
val1.desc: Sanitized environment, rigorous protocols and high quality disposable materials.

val2.title: Customization
val2.desc: Each project is developed with total attention to the story, idea and personality of those who trust in my work.

val3.title: Dialogue
val3.desc: Active listening and clear communication in all stages to transform ideas into real results.

val4.title: Excellence
val4.desc: Commitment to technique, composition and finishes that make a difference in the long term.

intro.title: Common Questions
intro.description: Before tattooing, it's normal to want to understand every detail. Here are the answers to the most common questions.

faq1.a: The budget is made based on the size, complexity and style of the art. You send me your idea and references, and I return with a personalized proposal.

faq2.a: Yes, references are essential to understand your visual intention, but remember: each ZERRAINK project is authorial.

faq3.a: Absolutely. Each art is created from scratch to respect your anatomy and your history.

faq4.a: I analyze the old tattoo to understand how the new project can camouflage and transform the art in a harmonious way.

faq5.a: Pain is subjective and varies according to the part of the body. I guarantee a calm environment and techniques that minimize discomfort.

faq6.q: What care do I need to have afterwards?
faq6.a: You will receive a complete post-session care guide, including cleaning and recommended ointments for perfect healing.

faq7.a: Yes, the studio offers credit card installment options to facilitate your investment in art.

faq8.a: The appointment is made after the approval of the budget, upon payment of a date reservation deposit.

footer.title: Still have questions?
footer.description: If your question isn't here, feel free to call me directly. I'm at your disposal.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: Your privacy is important to ZERRAINK. It is my policy and the studio's to respect your privacy regarding any information of yours that may be collected on the ZERRAINK website.
privacy.p2: I request personal information only when it is actually necessary to provide you with a service. I do so by fair and legal means, with your knowledge and consent.
privacy.p3: I do not share personally identifiable information publicly or with third parties, except when required by law. This site may contain links to external sites that are not operated by me.
privacy.cookiesDesc: By accepting cookies, you help the studio improve the reading journey and load portfolios more efficiently.
privacy.cookiesRejected: Cookies were declined. Your choices were respected.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.p1: By accessing the ZERRAINK website, you agree to comply with these terms of service, all applicable laws and regulations and agree that you are responsible for compliance with all applicable local laws.
terms.p2: Permission is granted to temporarily download a copy of the materials on the ZERRAINK website, for personal and non-commercial transitory viewing only.
terms.p3: The materials on the ZERRAINK website are provided 'as is'. ZERRAINK makes no warranties, expressed or implied, and hereby disclaims and negates all other warranties.
